content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
428 J Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento, CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

August 19, 2003

James D. Sanders, Councilmember
224 East 21st Street
Merced, CA 95340

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No.: W-03-183

Dear Mr. Sanders:

This letter is to advise that we have withdrawn your August 11, 2003, request for advice. Under the provisions of regulation 18329(b)(8)(D), copy enclosed, your inquiry presents a question outside the purview of the Political Reform Act.1 Additionally, unless you are an authorized representative of the public officials for whom you seek assistance, the Fair Political Practices Commission cannot address your questions or provide analysis. (See regulation 18329(b)(8)(B)).

Should you have any additional questions regarding this matter, please contact the Commission at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: John W. Wallace
Assistant General Counsel

Enclosure
JWW:jg

1 Government Code sections 81000 – 91014. Commission regulations appear at Title 2, sections 18109-18997, of the California Code of Regulations.
